name: Apple Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the apples and place them in a large bowl.
2. Add the brown sugar, sultanas, cayenne pepper, chopped onion, salt, and ginger to the bowl with the apples.
3. Pour the vinegar over the mixture.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Transfer the mixture to a saucepan and cook over medium heat for about 30-40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chutney reaches your desired consistency.
6. Turn off the heat and allow the chutney to cool before serving or storing in sterilized jars.
